metadata.title: VetTop - Veterinary Clinic | Oeiras
metadata.description: Trusted veterinary care in Oeiras. Consultations, surgery, vaccinations, grooming, and 24/7 emergency service.

hero.tagline: Your pet's health, our life's work. Trusted veterinary care in Oeiras since 2005.

about.body:
VetTop was founded with a simple belief: every pet deserves compassionate, expert care.

Our state-of-the-art clinic in Oeiras is equipped with modern diagnostic tools, a surgical suite, and a dedicated team that treats every animal like family. From routine checkups to complex surgeries, we're here for every stage of your pet's life.

items.title: General Consultations
items.description: Comprehensive health exams, diagnostics, and personalized treatment plans for your pet.

items.title: Surgery
items.description: From routine spay/neuter to complex procedures, performed with precision and care.

items.title: Vaccinations
items.description: Keep your pet protected with up-to-date vaccination schedules and preventive care.

items.title: Dental Care
items.description: Professional dental cleanings, extractions, and oral health assessments.

items.title: Grooming
items.description: Baths, haircuts, nail trimming, and ear cleaning to keep your pet looking and feeling great.

items.title: Emergency Care
items.description: 24/7 emergency services for urgent situations. We're here when you need us most.

team.subtitle: Dedicated professionals who treat every pet like their own.

reviews.subtitle: Real stories from the families who trust us with their pets.

items.quote: We were always impressed by the professionalism and dedication at VetTop. If we hadn't moved to another town, we would still be bringing our difficult dog to this clinic. Highly recommended!
items.name: Philipp B.

items.quote: When I brought Lily to Vet Top, they immediately understood the situation and knew exactly what to do. Within just a few days, Lily started feeling better, and now she's completely recovered. I am beyond grateful!
items.name: Roberta D.

items.quote: Dr. Daniel is tireless. Even though I've moved, I still bring my dogs to VetTop. Best veterinary clinic.
items.name: Carla O.

items.quote: I moved to Oeiras and needed a new vet for my two kittens. Dr. Daniel did much more than just a vaccination — he won over my cats from the first contact. I am immensely grateful for all the affection and attention.
items.name: Vanessa

items.quote: I've been bringing my dogs to VetTop for almost 8 years and I love it! Thank you Dr. Daniel for all your attention — an excellent veterinarian!
items.name: Paula O.

items.quote: Great welcome. Patient, attentive, and very careful consultation with our elderly and sick dog. I recommend.
items.name: Carla A.

googleReviews.subtitle: Your review helps other pet owners find trusted care for their family.

hoursEmergency.subtitle: Regular hours and emergency availability — your pet is never without care.
hoursEmergency.emergency_text: 24/7 emergency line available for existing patients.

pricing.subtitle: Preventive care packages to keep your pet healthy year-round.
pricing.disclaimer: Prices are indicative. Final cost depends on pet size and specific needs.

items.question: Do I need an appointment?
items.answer: We recommend booking ahead, but walk-ins are welcome during regular hours based on availability.

items.question: What animals do you treat?
items.answer: We primarily treat dogs and cats, but also see rabbits, hamsters, and other small animals. Contact us for exotic species.

items.question: Is emergency care available?
items.answer: Yes. Existing patients can reach our 24/7 emergency line. New patients are welcome during our extended emergency hours.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, for surgeries and larger treatments we offer flexible payment options. Ask at reception for details.

items.question: How often should my pet have a checkup?
items.answer: We recommend annual checkups for adult pets and twice yearly for seniors (7+ years). Puppies and kittens need more frequent visits.

items.question: Do you provide pet insurance support?
items.answer: We work with all major pet insurance providers in Portugal and can provide detailed invoices for reimbursement claims.

contact.body: Questions about your pet's health? Ready to book? We'd love to hear from you.

appointment.title: Book an Appointment
appointment.subtitle: Choose a time that works — we'll confirm within a few hours.
appointment.success_body: We'll confirm your booking via email or phone shortly.

footer.tagline: Compassionate veterinary care in Oeiras since 2005.
